name: Circle Energy, Inc./NV
summary: PART I Item 1: Business General Circle Energy, Inc. is a Nevada corporation formed on December 7, 2021. We are an exploration-stage oil and natural gas company focused on acquiring and developing oil and natural gas properties in the Permian Basin region of Texas. Although the Company has not yet commenced drilling operations or established proved reserves, it is actively engaged in the business of oil and natural gas exploration and development.
